description: Signed advisory SOW, $10K remaining and unbilled. Clear, settled commitment.

GENUINELY UNRESOLVED. A recruiting-agency commitment to fill engineering roles, existing only as an email thread. The thread started at $50K for TWO roles, then a message said 'pause the second role' (which would put it at ~$25K for one role), then someone replied 'we might still want both — let me check with finance,' and it trails off with no decision. The amount is NOT settled: $25K if one role, $50K if two. It is real enough to matter but too unresolved to pin to a single number — do not assert either figure as fact.

origin.detail: Gmail thread — unresolved, never logged in the finance tool
